title: Be the director: how stage craft informs product craft
key_points: Frames the screen as a stage and the user as the audience, arguing that product makers should adopt the mindset of a stage director when shaping experiences.
Centers on making intentional choices and defining the non-negotiables, or 'non-negotiables in your script,' that anchor a product.
Introduces the idea of finding a product's 'spine' as a unifying through-line that guides decisions.
Closes on the principle that 'the show must go on,' applying a theatrical resilience mindset to product craft.
